fields.description:
At Vanta, our mission is to help businesses earn and prove trust. We believe that security should be monitored and verified continuously, and we empower companies to practice better security and prove it with ease. Vanta has a kind and talented team, and while some have prior security experience, many have been successful at Vanta without it. 

As we scale our enterprise business, strategic partnerships with Global Systems Integrators represent one of our highest-impact growth levers—bringing Vanta's platform to the world's largest organizations through their most trusted advisors.

As the Director of Strategic GSI Partners at Vanta, you'll build and lead Vanta's relationships with the world's leading Global Systems Integrators (GSIs), including Accenture, Deloitte, PwC, and EY. You'll establish the strategic foundation for a scalable, revenue-generating alliance program that positions Vanta's platform within the cybersecurity, compliance, and managed services capabilities of our GSI partners. This role combines strategic partnership acumen, enterprise relationship management, and operational execution to drive measurable pipeline and revenue impact through trusted global partnerships. You'll have high visibility across the organization and work closely with executive leadership to define how partnerships accelerate Vanta's growth in the enterprise segment.

What you’ll do as a Strategic Alliance Manager at Vanta:

 - Build and deepen executive relationships with cybersecurity, GRC, and managed services leaders at Accenture, Deloitte, PwC, EY, and other strategic GSIs to establish trusted, long-term partnerships.

 - Integrate Vanta's solutions into GSI go-to-market programs and ecosystem initiatives, enrolling Vanta into relevant alliance programs to embed our offerings in partner GTM motions.

 - Lead joint strategy and value mapping workshops to align Vanta's Compliance, Third-Party Risk Management, and AI capabilities with GSI service lines and identify lighthouse opportunities.

 - Define and execute a strategic roadmap for GSI partnerships, establishing near- and long-term milestones that drive measurable business impact—from pipeline influence to sourced revenue.

 - Enable partner success by training alliance teams, solution architects, and sellers to position Vanta's products effectively within their organizations.

 - Scale repeatable GTM motions through co-branded content, executive roundtables, whitepapers, thought leadership, and vertical-specific plays that drive joint pipeline growth.

 - Partner cross-functionally with Sales, Solutions Engineering, Marketing, Product, and Executive teams to ensure alignment and remove barriers to joint success.

 - Establish metrics, reporting frameworks, and success criteria to track partnership performance and demonstrate business impact.

 - Expand Vanta's GSI presence into new verticals and regional teams based on early wins, targeting GSI partnerships to contribute 30%+ of new ARR bookings over time.

 - Travel globally across the Americas, EMEA, and APJ to build relationships, support partner initiatives, and drive strategic collaboration.

How to be successful in this role:

 - 15+ years of experience in strategic alliances, global partnerships, or GSI engagement—ideally in cybersecurity, compliance, or enterprise SaaS, or directly from a GSI

 - Proven success navigating and influencing large, matrixed organizations like Accenture, Deloitte, PwC, and EY

 - Track record of building high-impact partnerships that deliver measurable pipeline and revenue results, ideally in a zero-to-one or early-stage partnership environment

 - Demonstrated ability to think strategically while remaining hands-on with tactical execution

 - Exceptional cross-functional collaboration skills with experience partnering effectively with Sales, Marketing, Product, Solutions Engineering, and Executive teams

 - Strong executive presence and communication skills, with the ability to influence senior leaders both internally and at partner organizations

 - Bias for action in fast-paced, high-growth environments with comfort managing ambiguity and evolving priorities

 - Experience developing partnership strategies, operational frameworks, and repeatable GTM motions at scale

 - Deep understanding of enterprise sales cycles, partner ecosystem dynamics, and how to drive joint revenue through indirect channels

 - Must be authorized to work in the U.S. without the need for current or future employer sponsorship.

 - Open to using AI to amplify their skills and strengthen their work - demonstrating curiosity, a willingness to learn, and sound judgment in applying AI responsibly to improve efficiency and impact.

What you can expect as a Vanta’n:

 - Industry-competitive compensation

 - 100% covered medical, dental, and vision benefits with dependents coverage

 - 16 weeks paid parental Leave for all new parents

 - Health & wellness and remote workplace stipends

 - Family planning benefits

 - 401(k) matching

 - Flexible work hours and location

 - Open PTO policy

 - 11 paid holidays in the US

 - Offices in SF, NYC, London, Dublin, and Sydney

To provide greater transparency to candidates, we share base pay ranges for all US-based job postings regardless of state. We set standard base pay ranges for all roles based on function, level, and country location, benchmarked against similar-stage growth companies. Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors and may vary based on candidate location, skills, depth of work experience, and relevant licenses/credentials.

#LI-remote

At Vanta, we are committed to hiring diverse talent of different backgrounds and as such, it is important to us to provide an inclusive work environment for all. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender identity, age, religion, sexual orientation, veteran or disability status, or any other protected class. As an equal opportunity employer, we encourage and welcome people of all backgrounds to apply.

About Vanta

We started in 2018, in the wake of several high-profile data breaches. Online security was only becoming more important, but we knew firsthand how hard it could be for fast-growing companies to invest the time and manpower it takes to build a solid security foundation. Vanta was inspired by a vision to restore trust in internet businesses by enabling companies to improve and prove their security. From our early days automating security monitoring for compliance standards like SOC 2, HIPAA and ISO 27001 to creating the world's leading Trust Management Platform, our vision remains unchanged. 

Now more than ever, making security continuous—not just a point-in-time check— is essential. Thousands of companies rely on Vanta to build, maintain and demonstrate their trust— all in a way that's real-time and transparent.

Referral Instructions

If you are being referred for the role, please contact that person to apply on your behalf.
fields.title: Director of Strategic GSI Partners
